title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 21-A. COOPERATIVE LOCAL GOVERNMENT INCENTIVES

§7631. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Cooperative Local Government Incentives Act".

            Acts 2014, No. 746, §1, eff. June 19, 2014; Acts 2018, No. 513, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 21-A.  COOPERATIVE LOCAL GOVERNMENT INCENTIVES
§7631.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Cooperative Local Government
Incentives Act".
Acts 2014, No. 746, §1, eff. June 19, 2014; Acts 2018, No. 513, §1.
